Package io.micronaut.mcp.conf.server

Interface McpServerConfiguration

All Superinterfaces:
io.micronaut.core.util.Toggleable
public interface McpServerConfiguration extends io.micronaut.core.util.Toggleable
MCP Server Configuration.

1.0.0

  • Method Details

    • getEndpoint

      @NonNull default @NonNull String getEndpoint()
      Returns:
      MCP Server endpoint. It applies to MCP Servers using HTTP transport. It defaults to "/mcp".

    • getTransport

      @NonNull default @NonNull Transport getTransport()
      Returns:
      The MCP Transport.

    • isReactive

      default boolean isReactive()
      Returns:
      Whether you want to define MCP Primitive handlers using reactive code.
